title: ROMANIA enforcement action against ING Bank NV Amsterdam – Sucursala București S.A. (4,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 4,000 on ING Bank NV Amsterdam – Sucursala București S.A. The controller failed to implement adequate technical and organisational measures to ensure data security. This resulted in an employee handing bank account...
